Commercial Stucco in Milam County, TX

Milam County's commercial core in Cameron and Rockdale serves the agricultural, energy, and small-business communities that drive the local economy. Star Stucco of Austin brings professional commercial stucco services to property owners throughout the county.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Quality Commercial Stucco for Milam County Properties

Milam County occupies the fertile Blackland Prairie northeast of Austin, where farming, ranching, and lignite mining have shaped the economy for generations. Cameron, the county seat, and Rockdale anchor a commercial landscape of feed stores, equipment dealers, banks, government offices, and the retail businesses that serve these industries.

These properties face the same weather extremes found across Central Texas — blistering summer heat, spring storms that can drop heavy rain in short bursts, and occasional winter ice events. Commercial stucco in Milam County needs to be tough enough to handle all of it while maintaining a professional appearance that inspires confidence in customers and clients.

Our team values the relationships that define small-town business in Milam County. We communicate clearly, show up when we say we will, and treat your property with the same respect we would give our own. The finished stucco speaks for itself, and so does the way we conduct business.

What's Included With Our Commercial Stucco in Milam County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Site Assessment

We visit your Milam County property to inspect wall conditions, substrate types, and any factors that influence the stucco system design.

Project Planning & Scheduling

Our schedule respects your operating hours and accounts for the weather windows and material logistics specific to the Milam County area.

Surface Preparation

We prepare all surfaces with thorough cleaning, crack repair, and primer application so the stucco bonds correctly and lasts.

Commercial-Grade Application

Stucco is applied using professional techniques that maintain consistent quality across the entire project, whether it is a single wall or a multi-sided building.

Finish Coat & Detailing

The final texture and color are applied to your specifications, with clean details at all openings and architectural features.

Final Inspection & Warranty

We walk the project with you, confirm it meets your standards, and provide written warranty documentation.

Common Commercial Stucco Needs in Milam County

Milam County's commercial properties range from downtown retail to agricultural service buildings. Here are the stucco projects we see most often.

New Construction Exteriors

New commercial buildings in Cameron and Rockdale need stucco exteriors that are built to spec and designed for the region's demanding climate.

Storefront Renovation

Downtown Cameron and Rockdale storefronts benefit from stucco updates that modernize their street presence and help attract new customers and tenants.

Multifamily Buildings

Small apartment complexes and rental properties in Milam County require stucco that is durable, affordable to maintain, and holds its appearance over time.

Office Park Stucco

County offices, bank branches, and professional service buildings in Cameron maintain credibility with clean, well-applied stucco finishes.

Retail Center Restoration

Retail properties along Highway 77 and Highway 79 in Milam County benefit from stucco patching and recoating that restores a clean, maintained appearance.

HOA Common Areas

Community buildings and entrance features in Milam County developments need stucco that matches the original design and holds up with minimal ongoing maintenance.

Why Choose Us for Commercial Stucco in Milam County?

  • Reliable service to rural Milam County locations with crews who arrive prepared and on time
  • Full commercial insurance and bonding appropriate for the project size
  • Honest, transparent communication from the initial estimate through project completion
  • Materials and methods suited for the Blackland Prairie's clay soils, humidity, and storm exposure
  • Clean, respectful job sites that reflect well on your business while work is in progress
  • Fair pricing that reflects the actual scope of work — no surprise charges

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Milam County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Commercial Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule a Commercial Consultation

Call us to arrange a site visit at your Milam County property. We will look at the building together and discuss what you need.

2

Site Inspection & Scope

We document existing conditions, measure wall areas, and identify anything that will affect the project plan or pricing.

3

Detailed Bid & Timeline

Your written proposal covers costs, materials, and a schedule that fits your business operations and the realities of working in Milam County.

4

Professional Execution

We complete the work as proposed, keep the site clean, and review the finished project with you before leaving.
